John Quelch Obituary (2010) - Barre, VT - Times Argus
results.snippet: Mar 2, 2010 · John was born on March 10, 1940, in Burlington, to Richard J. and Evelyn S. Scarborough Quelch. John graduated from Alburg High School in 1958 and attended Vermont Technical College in Randolph.

results.title: PolkCountyToday.com
results.snippet: He eventually left Georgia Pacific/LP to become a plant manager at North American Procurement Plant, a small chip mill in Cleveland, TX. He is preceded in death by his parents; brother, Pat McCarty; sister, Ruth Ann Kimball; and son-in-law, Michael Smith.
